description: Mobile Automation Templates & Lessons Index (Robot Framework + Appium)

appManagement.description: Standardised App Launch, Install, and Reset patterns

auth.description: Cross-platform Mobile Login (Android/iOS) with session handling

gestures.description: Standard Scroll, Swipe, Pinch, and Drag actions

permissions.description: Handling System Alerts and OS Permissions (Camera, Location)

deepLinking.description: Direct navigation to app screens via URLs

hybrid.description: Integration with Python Helpers for API data seeding

fixtures.description: Single Source of Truth for cross-layer test data (API, Web, Mobile)
